items.title: UGC NET June 2026: Correction Window Open, Check Direct Link Here
items.summary: UGC NET June 2026 application correction window is now active. Candidates can edit permitted details till May 28, 2026, 11:50 PM. Check important dates, direct link here.

items.title: Typical energy bill to rise by £221 a year from July due to Iran war
items.summary: Millions of household energy bills governed by Ofgem's price cap will increase in July, the regulator says.
